name: New Century AIM VCT 2 Plc
summary: New Century AIM VCT 2 Plc is a venture capital trust (VCT) that invests in a portfolio of qualifying and non-qualifying companies listed on the Alternative Investment Market (AIM) of the London Stock Exchange, with the aim of providing investors with tax-free dividends and capital growth. The company focuses on investing in early-stage and growth businesses. The trust is based in the United Kingdom.
